notes: Single-project sbt build. One direct dependency: cats-core_2.13 2.10.0 (Scala %% artifact). dependencyOverrides forces the transitive cats-kernel_2.13 DOWN from its natural resolution of 2.10.0 (as declared in cats-core 2.10.0's POM) to 2.9.0. Coursier's highest-wins eviction would normally keep 2.10.0; the override beats it. Mend must report cats-kernel_2.13:2.9.0, NOT 2.10.0. Wave 1 probe #3 of sbt versioning coverage.

mend_detection_expectations.override_note: Mend must report `cats-kernel_2.13:2.9.0` (the override), NOT `cats-kernel_2.13:2.10.0` (natural resolution from cats-core 2.10.0). The dependencyOverrides setting forces the transitive below the version declared in cats-core's POM, beating Coursier's highest-wins eviction.
mend_detection_expectations.artifactId_format_note: Scala %% artifacts carry _2.13 binary suffix in artifactId. Assert on cats-core_2.13 and cats-kernel_2.13, never on bare names.
failure_modes_exercised: Override ignored -- natural resolution `2.10.0` reported instead of overridden `2.9.0`
Both `2.9.0` and `2.10.0` reported (duplicate) -- override and natural resolution not merged
cats-kernel_2.13 missing entirely -- POM traversal broken by downgraded override
Scala binary suffix stripped -- cats-kernel reported instead of cats-kernel_2.13
cats-kernel_2.13:2.9.0 classified as direct because dependencyOverrides is a top-level setting
